17.gl: to strike (lightly or severely, literally or figuratively)
17.kj: beat, cast forth, clap, give (wounds), [idiom] go forward, [idiom] indeed, kill, make (slaughter), murderer, punish, slaughter, slay(-er, -ing), smite(-r, -ing), strike, be stricke

17.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
17.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

17.gl: paleness, whether of persons (from fright), or of plants (from drought)

18.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
18.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
18.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

18.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
18.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

18.gl: 'I pray', 'now', or 'then'; added mostly to verbs (in the Imperative or Future), or to interjections, occasionally to an adverb or conjunction
18.kj: I beseech (pray) thee (you), go to, now, oh.
18.dv: a primitive particle of incitement and entreaty, which may usually be rendered;

18.gl: to set (literally or figuratively); intensively, to found; reflexively, to sit down together, i.e. settle, consult
18.kj: appoint, take counsel, establish, (lay the, lay for a) found(-ation), instruct, lay, ordain, set, [idiom] sure.

18.gl: the heart (as the most interior organ);
18.kj: [phrase] bethink themselves, breast, comfortably, courage, ((faint), (tender-) heart(-ed), midst, mind, [idiom] unawares, understanding.
18.dv: from H3823 (לָבַב); used also like H3820 (לֵב)

18.gl: properly, the upper part, used only adverbially with prefix upward, above, overhead, from the top, etc.
18.kj: above, exceeding(-ly), forward, on ([idiom] very) high, over, up(-on, -ward), very.

19.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

19.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

19.gl: a tree (from its firmness); hence, wood (plural sticks)
19.kj: [phrase] carpenter, gallows, helve, [phrase] pine, plank, staff, stalk, stick, stock, timber, tree, wood.

19.gl: an olive (as yielding illuminating oil), the tree, the branch or the berry
19.dv: probably from an unused root (akin to H2099 (זִו));

19.gl: seed; figuratively, fruit, plant, sowing-time, posterity

20.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
20.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

21.gl: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
21.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

21.gl: to undulate (as the earth, the sky, etc.; also a field of grain), particularly through fear; specifically, to spring (as a locust)
21.kj: make afraid, (re-) move, quake, (make to) shake, (make to) tremble.

21.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
21.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
21.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

21.gl: Jehudah (or Judah), the name of five Israelites; also of the tribe descended from the first, and of its territory

21.dv: from H2215 (זָרַב) and H894 (בָּבֶל); descended of (i.e. from) Babylon, i.e. born there;

22.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
22.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
22.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

22.gl: to descend (literally, to go downwards; or conventionally to a lower region, as the shore, a boundary, the enemy, etc.; or figuratively, to fall); causatively, to bring down (in all the above applications)

22.kj: [idiom] become, change, come, be converted, give, make (a bed), overthrow (-turn), perverse, retire, tumble, turn (again, aside, back, to the contrary, every way).

22.gl: to ride (on an animal or in a vehicle); causatively, to place upon (for riding or generally), to despatch
22.kj: bring (on (horse-) back), carry, get (oneself) up, on (horse-) back, put, (cause to, make to) ride (in a chariot, on, -r), set.

22.gl: a brother (used in the widest sense of literal relationship and metaphorical affinity or resemblance (like father))
22.kj: another, brother(-ly); kindred, like, other. Compare also the proper names beginning with 'Ah-' or 'Ahi-'.

22.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
22.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

23.kj: accept, bring, buy, carry away, drawn, fetch, get, infold, [idiom] many, mingle, place, receive(-ing), reserve, seize, send for, take (away, -ing, up), use, win.

23.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
23.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
